summary: Comprehensive end-to-end frontend testing of FINNNESS Expo/React Native app via web preview. All 16 critical user flows passed: splash auto-redirect, register -> auto-seed -> home, all 5 home stat/progress widgets, workout list (5 seeded cards), workout detail + edit nav, meals tab (4 seeded meals), meal detail (Oatmeal/etc.), sleep hero/bedtime/wakeup/quality/weekly, profile (avatar/name/info rows/logout), Firebase auth persistence after reload, logout, re-login with same credentials, and forgot-password (Firebase sendPasswordResetEmail returns success feedback). Firebase RTDB region asia-southeast1 working. No backend (FastAPI) since architecture is direct Firebase. Minor RN-web deprecation warnings only (shadow* / pointerEvents) — non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-web deprecation: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated; use 'boxShadow' for web parity. Reference: /app/frontend/src/constants/theme.ts (SHADOW_CARD)
RN-web deprecation: props.pointerEvents is deprecated; move to style.pointerEvents. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:40

action_items: (Optional/polish) Migrate SHADOW_CARD from shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to a boxShadow string for RN-web to silence deprecation warnings.
(Optional/polish) Change <View ... pointerEvents="none"> to <View style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}> in app/index.tsx wave wrapper.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext seeds on every onAuthStateChanged success — seedUserIfEmpty is idempotent (checks existence first), so this is fine but does run an extra RTDB read on every app open; acceptable.
Seed sleep totalHours uses Math.random jitter so today's value differs run-to-run (e.g. 7.8h observed); intentional for chart, not a bug.
No backend (FastAPI) endpoints — confirmed; review_request correctly scoped to frontend-only.
seed_data_creation: Registered new account test_1781280450@finnnessapp.dev / Finness123! — Firebase auto-seeded 5 workouts + today's 4 meals + 7-day sleep under finnness/users/{uid}/. Also exercised stable account e2e_user@finnnessapp.dev via forgot-password.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use mobile viewport 390x844. Public URL https://wellness-mvvm-app.preview.emergentagent.com. Register a fresh account each run (timestamped email) OR reuse e2e_user@finnnessapp.dev / Finness123! once it exists. Bottom tab nav: use page.get_by_text('Meals'|'Sleep'|'Profile', exact=True).first.click() — testIDs on tab items aren't exposed by expo-router Tabs. All other screens have testIDs documented in screens (home-*, workout-card-{id}, meal-card-{type}, sleep-hero-card, profile-*). Auth persistence works (AsyncStorage). Splash shows for ~1.6s before redirect.
